description: 多规则循环筛选缺陷框，移除空行后限量采样
name: 日常捞图
python_code:
def process_data(df):
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "SQL输出类别统计")
    view(df, "SQL输出DataFrame")
    # [loop1] loop(rules)
    df = apply_filter_rules(df)
    view(df, "过滤之后的DataFrame")
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "过滤之后的类别统计")
    # [s1] 随机采样
    df = apply_random_sample_rows(df, max_rows=get_env("MAX_RAWS"), random_seed=get_env("_RANDOM_SEED"))
    view(df, "最终输出的DataFrame")
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "最终输出的类别统计")
    return df
sql_template: SELECT d.*, r.product_type AS result_product_type FROM `product_detection_detail_result` d LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_no, MAX(product_type) AS product_type FROM product_detection_result GROUP BY product_no) r ON d.product_no = r.product_no WHERE d.c_time BETWEEN '${START_TIME}' AND '${END_TIME}' AND d.ext NOT LIKE '%"original_predictions": []%'
